post.description: Text to publish on the controlled LinkedIn-shaped feed.

hostname.description: Browser hostname; empty loads SOCIAL_BROWSER_HOSTNAME from .env.

host.description: Server bind host; empty loads SOCIAL_BIND_HOST from .env.

meta.label: Publish a controlled LinkedIn-shaped post
meta.description: Loads route/domain/host settings from .env, starts the controlled development site, publishes, and verifies the feed.
